{{Infobox character
| name = Suu
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

''See also: [[Suu Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Suu is a versatile weapon inherited by [[Mercy]] from her mother, who was a [[Monarch]]. The object can transform between two primary forms: a staff and a bow. In its staff configuration, it features a [[dragon]]'s head that can hiss or react to the user's commands. When converted into a bow, it is known as [[Eclipse]], an [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]], which is constructed from slick black strands resembling knotted vines and is taller than [[Mercy]] herself. The bow's shaft contains a [[dragon]]'s head with violet eyes, from which arrows emerge. Suu possesses significant power and is capable of twisting arrows in midair through the influence of a [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]]. Despite its strength, the weapon has limitations regarding the type of ammunition it can withstand.}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Suu]] is being cradled by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] uses [[Suu]] as a bow.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suu]] is a bow inherited by [[Mercy]] from her [[Monarch]] mother.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suu]] is woven from slick black strands and has a violet-eyed [[dragon]]'s head in the center of its shaft.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suu]] is an item held by [[Akura Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suu]] is an object rolled between [[Mercy]]'s hands.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Suu]] is a staff of twisted black madra used by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Suu is a versatile item that can function as a staff or transform into a bow featuring a draconic head. During a ceremony, [[Mercy]] chooses not to carry the object. While being moved by [[Mercy]], Suu is dragged along the ground. The staff can bend into a bow capable of firing violet arrows and eventually serves as a mount for [[Mercy]] to ride.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] drags [[Suu]] along the ground.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Suu]] is a staff that can take a bow form with a draconic head.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Suu]] is an item that [[Mercy]] does not carry during the ceremony.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Suu]] is a staff that can bend into a bow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Suu]] is associated with a bow that fires violet arrows.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Suu]] is a mount ridden by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] flies on [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] was pulling the last inch of [[Suu]] free.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] braced herself on [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suu]] is [[Mercy's mother]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suu]] is a character who appears in the form of a walking stick.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Suu]] is a bow that the [[Seed of Honor]] monument resembles.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] pulled [[Suu]] to a halt in midair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] rides on the back of [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is raising [[Suu]] to the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] raised her old companion, [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suu]] is a creature that hisses.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suu]] can take a staff form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Mercy’s face was pale, and she gripped Suu. “That’s my mother.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
